# Framer Mockup

> Real-time 3D device mockup plugin for Framer. Drop a screenshot or video
> on a real 3D Apple device (iPhone 17 Pro, iPhone Air, iPad Pro, Apple
> Watch Ultra, iMac), orbit the camera, pick device colors and finishes,
> then publish the LIVE interactive 3D scene on your Framer site or export
> 4K images and videos. No Blender, no Rotato, no After Effects.

## What it does

- Live 3D mockups rendered in WebGL directly inside Framer and on published sites
- Screen content: drop any screenshot (PNG/JPG/WebP) or video (MP4/WebM)
- Devices: iPhone 17 Pro, iPhone Air, iPad Pro, Apple Watch Ultra, iMac
- Device colors: Apple palette + custom hex, brushed metal / matte / glossy finishes
- Animations: follow cursor (page-wide), auto-rotate, float loop, grab-rotate
- Camera: free orbit, saved camera poses, zoom — replayed exactly on the published page
- Export: 4K PNG and 4K transparent video, rendered offline in the browser
- Performance: adaptive resolution per device and network, poster fallback on slow connections

## Pricing (EUR, one-time or subscription per plan page)

- Starter: EUR 19
- Pro: EUR 49
- Studio: EUR 99
- Founder Lifetime: EUR 499 (limited to 25 seats)
